stemHtml:
Given the deviation table of a Direct Reading Compass.

To fly 000 030 060 090 120 150 180 210 240 270 300 330
Steer 359 030 061 092 121 150 178 209 242 272 298 331

The desired True Heading is 155°. The variation in the area is 10°W. What should be the indication of the Direct Reading Compass?
